prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG arcane library with warm wood tones. Natsu Ashbell, a feminine frontline adventurer in a short guild cloak and leather armor, stands beside Natsu Silverbrook, an androgynous guild coordinator in a formal cloak. Both raise their hands in a synchronized, harmless spell practice, creating glowing soft mana ribbons between them. Readable cooperative body motion, cinematic lighting, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous arcane library shot. Natsu Silverbrook adjusts their hand position to match Natsu Ashbell's stance, causing the glowing mana ribbons to stabilize into a calm, steady stream of light between them. The two characters maintain a composed, cooperative posture, emphasizing teamwork and focus. No combat harm, no text, no watermark.
